branch_metadata.branch_rationale: Structural / loop-class closure repository default fallback

status_note: P2prime S1_CORE patches are NOT under-supported zero modes that could be lifted into A_MATURE. They are OVER-AMPLIFIED zero modes: cw_net_corrected is 3.4x above the P5 rank-1 reference, abs_over_sync_floor is 3.2x above, xi_support is 1.5x above — while structural properties (defect, compactness, retention) match P5 within 7-20%. A Self-Closure 'promotion' in the usual lift-up sense is not applicable; what the data would require is a downward damping of the zero-mode amplitude by factor ~3.4, which is categorically different from Self-Closure promotion.
no_recompute_clause: B2 reads A1/A2 outputs directly. No new physics, no new runs, no new simulations triggered.

interpretation.core_patches_structurally_mature: Defect (ratio 1.07), compactness (0.97), and retention (1.20) of P2prime S1_CORE patches match the P5 reference within 7-20% — the geometric and dissipative ingredients are there.
interpretation.core_patches_dynamically_over_amplified: cw_net_corrected (3.4x), abs_over_sync_floor (3.2x), and xi_support (1.5x) overshoot the P5 reference by factors that cannot be explained by finite-N noise. The zero-mode amplitude is over-driven.
interpretation.physical_root_cause_hypothesis: At N=30 with the P2prime defect parameters (g=1.25, omega=1.40, lambda_triangle=2.3), the Xi-reactivity is too strong relative to dissipation: reac_over_diss = 0.718 (P2prime) vs 0.524 (P5) — 37% higher reactivity-to-dissipation ratio. The S1_CORE carrier has enough structural support to form, but the local Xi-reaction term pumps the zero-mode past the lock window.

self_closure_promotion_feasibility.classical_lift_up_reason: Self-Closure promotion in the ZMEQ-A1/A4 sense assumes the core-patch carrier is near-mature but sub-threshold (cw_net approx 0, abs_over_sync approx 1) and a mild reactive boost would drive it into equilibrium. P2prime S1_CORE is the opposite configuration: cw_net = +0.022 (far above sync_floor), abs_over_sync = 2.36 (far above 1). A boost would worsen it.

levers_that_would_achieve_damping: Increase gamma_damping term in CTP1 (currently 0.100 in P2prime slice, A1 coefficients)
Decrease alpha_xi (Xi-reactive coupling, currently 0.901 in P2prime A1 coefficients)
Increase lattice N toward N=50 (as P5 shows, the damping happens naturally at larger N due to finite-size-suppressed Xi-reactivity)
inverse_damping_interpretation.why_not_self_closure: Self-Closure refers to the patch carrier autonomously closing into zero-mode without external scaffolding. Damping the amplitude via gamma_damping or N-lift is NOT self-closure, it is external parameter adjustment.

seed_2_special_case.note: Seed 2 is both the most over-amplified S1_CORE patch (abs_over_sync = 2.53) AND the most heralding-failed seed (XCFP2 margin = -0.42). These two signals converge: the patch over-shoots the Xi-reactive amplitude so far that it exits the observable lock window entirely, producing negative heralding margin. Seeds 2 and 23 together drive 74% of the cross-seed SD (B1 finding).

verdict.reason: P2prime S1_CORE patches are NOT sub-threshold carriers. They are supra-threshold over-amplified zero modes that overshoot the authorization window. 'Promotion' in the ZMEQ-A1/A4 lift-up sense does not apply. Only an inverse damping (or N-lift) can align them to the P5 reference, and that is not a self-closure operation.

implications_for_b_chain.b3_boundary_drain_suppression: Independent of B2: even if S3/S4 drain is suppressed, the S1_CORE branch in seeds 2,3 would still be over-amplified. Drain suppression alone does not produce an A_MATURE regime.
implications_for_b_chain.b4_second_a_regime_decision: B2 rules out the simplest lift-up pathway. Given that B3 is also unable to solve the S1_CORE overshoot, B4 should conclude: P2prime is NOT a feasible second A_MATURE regime under existing run parameters. Either a new run class is needed (adjusted gamma_damping or N-lift) or P2prime is not the best second-A candidate.

honesty_guard.small_sample_scope_declared: P2prime S1_CORE n=2, P5 reference n=3 — A2 atlas surfaces only the top-ranked patches per regime; full 28-seed S1_CORE inventory for P2prime is not surfaced by A2.
